data.content: Shipped on main at commit 7532cc98f6ae. The implementation review skill now bases approval solely on code under review plus knot description/acceptance criteria, explicitly excludes notes and prior handoff_capsules from approval decisions, and requires enumerated spec violations in rejection handoffs. Verified with cargo test implementation_review -- --nocapture. make sanity in the current dirty workspace fails at 94.65% coverage due unrelated local modifications, but remote CI for main commit 7532cc98f6ae succeeded (CI, Release, Repo Hygiene, Changesets Version PR).
